"Let us analyze the data given for the positive numbers on the board.

midnight brings a quiet time to think about the sum of all values.

The largest five items account for a specific fraction of the total amount.

The smallest five items also make up another distinct part of the whole sum.

We must determine how many numbers exist without using forbidden words.

Adding the two known fractions gives a combined value of point five five.

This leaves a remaining portion for the numbers between the smallest and largest groups.

Each number in the middle group must be positive and fit within the available space.

The final count of all numbers written on the board is exactly ten."
